queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the impact of lacking a checking account on increased credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Statistical evidence regarding the association between savings balances below 100 DM and reduced credit risk exposure.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of credit stability related to checking account balances below 0 DM and decreased default likelihood.
